title: Qiryath #7158
definition:
Kirjath-sepher or Kirjath-sannah = "city of the book"

 1) a town in the mountains of Judah to the west of Hebron
nasbUsage:
Definition: Kirjath-sepher or Kirjath-sannah = "city of the book"

 1) a town in the mountains of Judah to the west of Hebron

    NASB:  city of writing, a city in Judah
